static_prototype_gate.purpose: Allow static planning, fixture, local read-only shell, mock consumer fixture, and validation evidence only.
static_prototype_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Static prototype gate does not activate customer-facing, live runtime, mutation, integration, credential, scheduler, notification, production, or execution capability.

customer_facing_readiness_gate.purpose: Evaluate customer-facing preview readiness in a future validated activation phase.
customer_facing_readiness_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.5 does not activate customer-facing readiness.

live_read_only_runtime_gate.purpose: Evaluate live read-only runtime readiness in a future validated activation phase.
live_read_only_runtime_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.5 does not activate live read-only runtime.

runtime_mutation_gate.purpose: Evaluate runtime mutation readiness in a future validated activation phase.
runtime_mutation_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.5 does not activate runtime mutation.

external_integration_gate.purpose: Evaluate external integration readiness in a future validated activation phase.
external_integration_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.5 does not activate external integration.

trading_execution_gate.purpose: Evaluate execution-capable runtime readiness in a future validated activation phase.
trading_execution_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.5 does not activate trading execution.

credential_handling_gate.purpose: Evaluate credential handling readiness in a future validated activation phase.
credential_handling_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.5 does not activate credential handling.

notification_scheduler_gate.purpose: Evaluate scheduler and notification dispatcher readiness in a future validated activation phase.
notification_scheduler_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.5 does not activate scheduling or notification dispatch.

production_deployment_gate.purpose: Evaluate production deployment readiness in a future validated activation phase.
production_deployment_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.5 does not activate production deployment.

non_activation_rules: A regression guard does not activate customer-facing readiness.
A regression guard does not activate live runtime readiness.
A regression guard does not activate execution readiness.
A regression guard does not activate trading automation readiness.
A regression guard does not activate broker/Binance connectivity.
A regression guard does not activate credential handling readiness.
A regression guard does not activate scheduler or notification dispatcher readiness.
A regression guard does not activate production deployment readiness.
A regression guard does not mutate trading facts, portfolio state, account state, cash state, or execution ledger state.
A regression guard only prevents accidental capability activation and validates non-activation.
required_conditions: All non-static future gates remain not_activated.
All non-static future gates keep current_phase_allowed false.
All non-static future gates keep activation_requested false.
All non-static future gates keep activation_granted false.
Trading facts, portfolio state, execution ledger state, cash state, broker connection, and Binance connection remain unchanged.

separation_rules: TWOS runtime/product SoT must never override LDD trading/execution SoT.
LDD trading/execution SoT must never override TWOS runtime/product SoT.
Regression guards and non-activation audits must never mutate trading facts, portfolio state, execution ledger state, account state, or cash state.
